name: durango-mini
description: 분산 존 서버 구조의 미니 듀랑고 — 5개 zone, 인공 latency 시뮬레이션

scripts.start: concurrently -n CTR,DISP,FR,CN,KR,JP,US -c yellow,blue,magenta,red,green,cyan,white "npm run central" "sleep 2 && npm run dispatcher" "sleep 2 && npm run zone:france" "sleep 2 && npm run zone:china" "sleep 2 && npm run zone:korea" "sleep 2 && npm run zone:japan" "sleep 2 && npm run zone:usa"
